content:
📜 New Silent Monk Perks
✔ They gain “The Oracle’s Insight”—once per semester, they may submit an anonymous written question that the entire class must engage with.
✔ If they succeed in total silence, they are exempt from one final paper requirement.

✅ Why This Works:
• Creates a fully immersive roleplay element.
• Encourages a philosophical engagement with absence.
• Ties into ascetic traditions in literature & theology.

📜 5. Additional Easter Eggs & Hidden Secrets

📜 Each unit now contains hidden rewards, puzzles, and references that can be unlocked.

✔ Secret Items – Hidden throughout the syllabus & readings, granting XP bonuses or reroll advantages.
✔ Mystery Figures – Occasionally, students will encounter a “hidden literary figure” who, if identified correctly, grants a one-time reward.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 226 (chunk 226/555)
